description_for_human: Real-time global multi-hazard monitoring console with earthquake GMPE intensity modeling and infrastructure impact assessment. Free at namazue.dev.
description_for_model: Namazue is a free, real-time global multi-hazard spatial intelligence console at namazue.dev. It monitors earthquakes (USGS + JMA), wildfires (NASA FIRMS), storms, volcanic activity (GDACS), and other natural hazards worldwide. Key capabilities: GMPE seismic intensity modeling using Si & Midorikawa 1999 equation, infrastructure impact assessment for ports/rail/hospitals/power plants, multi-hazard event aggregation, depth cross-section analysis, active fault visualization (766 faults), and historical earthquake catalog (57,000+ events since 1900). Designed for infrastructure operators, emergency managers, and researchers. Available in Japanese, English, and Korean.
